description: Create new Lookahead Task for the project schedule

task_id.description: ID of the associated Task in the Master Schedule

created_by_id.description: ID of the user who created the Lookahead Task

parent_id.description: ID of the parent Lookahead Task

name.description: The name of the Lookahead Task

start_date.description: Lookahead Task start date, in project time zone

end_date.description: Lookahead Task end date, in project time zone

row_number.description:
Defines the sequence in which Lookahead Tasks are normally
expected to be displayed

critical_path.description: True if this Lookahead Task is on the critical path

assignee_ids.description: IDs of Assignee(s) assigned to this Lookahead Task

resource_ids.description: IDs of Resource(s) assigned to this Lookahead Task

vendor_ids.description: IDs of Vendor(s) assigned to this Lookahead Task

segments.description:
Segments define the set of days for the entire date range of the Lookahead Task,
and the completion status of each day in the Lookahead Task

date.description: Date represented by the Lookahead Task Segment

status.description: Completion status of the Lookahead Task Segment

403.description: User does not have right permissions

parent_id.description: ID of the parent Lookahead Task

start_date.description: Task start date, in project time zone

end_date.description: Task end date, in project time zone

resource_ids.description: ID of Resource(s) to assign to this Lookahead Task

assignee_ids.description: ID of Contact(s) to assign to this Lookahead Task

vendor_ids.description: ID of Company(s) to assign to this Lookahead Task
